tools.name: golangci-lint
tools.scope: full project excluding ui/, docs/, examples/, vendor/, pkg/client/

linting.notes: Go linter has 20 enabled linters including errcheck, gosec, govet, staticcheck, etc. Also includes gofmt and goimports as formatters. UI linter uses TypeScript ESLint with React and Prettier plugins.

env_vars: KUBECONFIG=/dev/null - prevents tests from trying to access real cluster
GOTOOLCHAIN=auto - allows Go to download and use Go 1.25.7
STATIC_FILES=false - skips UI build during test
testing.mock_patterns: Uses testify/mock, mockery for generating mocks
testing.notes: 236 Go test files. Tests are split into unit tests (throughout codebase) and E2E tests (test/e2e/). E2E tests require Kubernetes cluster (K3s in CI). UI tests use Jest (yarn --cwd ui test). Some tests are tagged (api, cli, cron, executor, functional, plugins).

gating_checks.name: UI Tests
gating_checks.command: yarn --cwd ui install && yarn --cwd ui build && yarn --cwd ui test && yarn --cwd ui lint

ci.notes: CI uses changed-files detection to skip unnecessary jobs. E2E tests run in K3s cluster with matrix of profiles (minimal, mysql, plugins). Tests require Docker images to be built first. PR title must follow semantic commit convention.

build.notes: Full build with UI requires yarn and Node 20+. Build without static files (STATIC_FILES=false) only requires Go. Uses ldflags to embed version info. Can build for multiple platforms (linux/darwin/windows on amd64/arm64/ppc64le/riscv64/s390x).

conventions.test_naming: Test* functions for unit tests, Benchmark* for benchmarks
conventions.notes: Uses standard Go conventions. Test files alongside source files. E2E tests in test/e2e/ with build tags. Uses testify for assertions.

setup_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y make git curl protobuf-compiler clang-format

lint_commands.notes: 0 issues found (after exclusions). Took ~40s, uses ~7GB RAM peak.

test_commands.notes: All unit tests pass. E2E tests skipped (require K8s).
Tests via Makefile target, same as CI

container_recipe.notes: Must use GOTOOLCHAIN=auto because go.mod requires Go 1.25.7 which is newer than the base golang:1.23 image. This allows Go to auto-download the required toolchain. Build succeeds, produces 140MB binary.

results.command: apt-get update && apt-get install -y make git curl protobuf-compiler clang-format && go mod download
results.output_snippet: Successfully installed system deps and downloaded Go modules
results.notes: Required GOTOOLCHAIN=auto to download Go 1.25.7 toolchain
Linter ran successfully, filtered 821 issues down to 0 based on exclusion rules
All unit tests passed. E2E tests not run (require K8s cluster)

validation.summary: install OK, build OK (140MB binary), lint OK (0 issues after filters), tests OK (all unit tests passed)

gaps: E2E tests require Kubernetes cluster (K3s in CI) - cannot validate without infrastructure
UI tests require Node 20+ and yarn - not validated in Go-only container
Codegen verification requires protoc and multiple code generation tools - complex setup
SDK tests (Java, Python) require respective language runtimes
Some tests use build tags (api, cli, cron, executor, functional, plugins) - need explicit tag specification
Full build with UI (STATIC_FILES=true) requires yarn ecosystem
